scripts.demo:verify-prod: npm run readiness:publish && npm run smoke:realtime && npm run verify:live-simulation && npm run mobile:android:doctor
scripts.verify: npm run verify:static && npm run verify:bindings && npm run verify:simulation && npm run check:module && node --check scripts/spacetime-client.mjs && node --check scripts/simulate.mjs && node --check scripts/load-volunteers.mjs && node --check scripts/probe-realtime.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-realtime.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-live-simulation.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-readiness.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-prod.mjs && npm run build
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.mobile:add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:android:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.mobile:android:install: npm run mobile:android:apk && cd android && ./gradlew installDebug
scripts.spacetime:dev:local: spacetime dev spacecanvas-local --server local --module-path spacetimedb --module-bindings-path src/module_bindings --client-lang typescript --run "npm run dev" --no-config
